✨✨Essential Dock Hub for Steam Deck— —Lemorele Docking Station is designed for Valve Steam Deck, equipped with a HDMI 1.4 4K@30Hz output for large screen, 1000Mbps Gigabit Ethernet for no lag, 100W Type-C PD fast charging port for no power off, 3 USB 2.0 ports for multiplayer game, which is the essential companion for your Steam Deck.

【Not Only A Hub But Also A Stand】6-in-1 Steam Deck hub blends Hub and stand together perfectly. Save money and keep your desktop clean and tidy. This is a great value for a functional and versatile USB-C docking station, it does feel solid.

detail_text: 【LATEST WIRELESS TECHNOLOGY】 Adopting the premium components, no need to peel off the phone`s case before charging, Our wireless charger works with most kinds of cases which are within 5mm/0.19 inch such as rubber case, hybrid case, plastic/TPU/PC cases, etc.You`re free to enjoy this wireless and limitless charging experience. 【FAST CHARGING FOR SMART PHONE】15 W max Output,Its will be charger faster then others 15W/10W max,1.5X faster than standard wireless chargers.*Requires QC3.0 adapter (5V-2A, 9V-1.67A) (ADAPTER NOT INCLUDED IN THE PACKAGE) 【Removable & VERTICAL & HORIZONTAL CHARGING】 With an LED in the front that lights up when you're charging your phone, this wireless charger stand touts anti-slip bars and sleek design, In addition to the ability to charge your phone horizontally or vertically, whichever provides a perfect view angle for your eyes, no matter you watch movies, listen to music, make calls or send the message without interruption during the whole charging process. 【SAFER CHARGING & MUILT-PROTECTION】 Using highly efficient components and an advanced chipset, charging intelligently, integrated smart chip inside it. Exclusive Multi-functional Intelligent Protect Technology provides iPhone wireless charger temperature control, over-current protection, over-voltage protection, and more. detail_html:

【FAST CHARGING FOR SMART PHONE】15W max Output,Its will be charger faster then others 15W/10W max,1.5X faster than standard wireless chargers.*Requires QC3.0 adapter (5V-2A, 9V-1.67A) (ADAPTER NOT INCLUDED IN THE PACKAGE)

【Removable & VERTICAL & HORIZONTAL CHARGING】With an LED in the front that lights up when you're charging your phone, this wireless charger stand touts anti-slip bars and sleek design, In addition to the ability to charge your phone horizontally or vertically, whichever provides a perfect view angle for your eyes, no matter you watch movies, listen to music, make calls or send the message without interruption during the whole charging process.

【SAFER CHARGING & MUILT-PROTECTION】Using highly efficient components and an advanced chipset, charging intelligently, integrated smart chip inside it. Exclusive Multi-functional Intelligent Protect Technology provides iPhone wireless charger temperature control, over-current protection, over-voltage protection, and more.

Specifications:
Color: Black/White
Output : 5W/7.5W/10W/15W(15W Max will be charging faster than others)
Charge efficiency: >75%
Charging frequency: 110 - 205 KHz

Package Included:
1*Fast wireless charger pad
1*1m Type C USB Cable
1*Charger pad holder(The holder will not included if you do not selected)

Note:Before buy ,please confirm your phones support wireless charging.

title: MOFT Snap-On Phone Stand & Wallet MOVAS™ (MagSafe® Compatible)
detail_text: All MOFT Products come with 6 Months Local Warranty Product Highlights Made with MOVAS (IMPORTANT) Understanding the product: 1) Only compatible with 12, 13, 14, 15 and 16, 17 Series 2) Only compatible when used with: a) 12, 13, 14, 15 and 16, 17 Series Without Case or b) original Magsaafe Cases or c) our tested Magasafe compatible case which can be found in our shop. 3) NOT compatible with cases without Magsaafe. 4) Attach a magnetic ring (can be found in our shop) onto your non-magnetic phone for magnetic attachment Features: MOFT Snap-on Stand & Wallet for 12, 13, 14,15,16,17 Series World's 1st MagSaafe® compatible stand & wallet, bringing a whole new experience to your 12, 13, 14, 15 and 16, 17 Series Features: - Coexistence of Flexibility and Freedom Snap-on in a blink, Stand, and Fold Expanding on the popular MOFT X classic phone stand, the new MOFT Snap-On employs dual magnets to attach securely to 12 series and beyond. The fold-design allows for intuitive and flexible usage - simply snap it on, stand it up and fold it back into place. A powerful new assistant in your gadget life. - Classic portrait and landscape modes A new way to make your phone stand up Three viewing modes - Portrait, Landscape, and the new Floating mode - enable you to look at your phone screen in the most comfortable way, whether you’re browsing the web in portrait, streaming in landscape, or having a zoom meeting in floating mode. - Snap-Snap The bridge between your phone and your everyday environment The double-sided magnet design allows you to snap your phone anywhere you like. The magnetic strength comes from 16 small built-in magnets. So you can experience the hands-free from every corner of your home with MOFT’s Magnetic Sticky Pads which can snap on any surface to transform your phone into an exercise, bath time, or cooking companion. - Instant removal, uninterrupted enjoyment Total freedom with effortless detachment. And seamlessly layers with the MagSaafe® Charger for uninterrupted charging while viewing content, streaming a movie, or doing a video call. - MaagSafe® Compatibility Works with 12, 13, 14, 15 and 16, 17 series. It can also be snapped to any MagaSafe® compatible phone cases and other accessories. It works with only MagaSafe® compatible phone cases. - Vegan leather and a steal at its price Soft vegan leather not only feels smooth to touch but also is environmentally sustainable. At half the cost of most phone wallets, it’s the most accessible way to perfect the way you interact with your phone. Available in four classic colors that never go out of style including Night Black, Sienna Brown, Oxford Blue, and Grey. - Burden-free technology and optimized convenience Unseen, Unnoticed and Unfelt Continuing MOFT’s invisible design philosophy the slim MOFT Snap-on is unseen when attached, unfelt when worked on, unnoticed when carried, taking your phone experience a gigantic leap forward with no burden to your style of life.
detail_html:
All MOFT Products come with 6 Months Local Warranty

Product Highlights

Made with MOVAS

(IMPORTANT) Understanding the product:

1) Only compatible with 12, 13, 14, 15 and 16, 17 Series

2) Only compatible when used with:

a) 12, 13, 14, 15 and 16, 17 Series Without Case or

b) original Magsaafe Cases or

c) our tested Magasafe compatible case which can be found in our shop.

3) NOT compatible with cases without Magsaafe.

4) Attach a magnetic ring (can be found in our shop) onto your non-magnetic phone for magnetic attachment

Features:

MOFT Snap-on Stand & Wallet for 12, 13, 14,15,16,17 Series

World's 1st MagSaafe® compatible stand & wallet, bringing a whole new experience to your 12, 13, 14, 15 and 16, 17 Series

Features:

- Coexistence of Flexibility and Freedom

Snap-on in a blink, Stand, and Fold

Expanding on the popular MOFT X classic phone stand, the new MOFT Snap-On employs dual magnets to attach securely to 12 series and beyond. The fold-design allows for intuitive and flexible usage - simply snap it on, stand it up and fold it back into place. A powerful new assistant in your gadget life.

- Classic portrait and landscape modes

A new way to make your phone stand up

Three viewing modes - Portrait, Landscape, and the new Floating mode - enable you to look at your phone screen in the most comfortable way, whether you’re browsing the web in portrait, streaming in landscape, or having a zoom meeting in floating mode.

- Snap-Snap

The bridge between your phone and your everyday environment

The double-sided magnet design allows you to snap your phone anywhere you like. The magnetic strength comes from 16 small built-in magnets. So you can experience the hands-free from every corner of your home with MOFT’s Magnetic Sticky Pads which can snap on any surface to transform your phone into an exercise, bath time, or cooking companion.

- Instant removal, uninterrupted enjoyment

Total freedom with effortless detachment. And seamlessly layers with the MagSaafe® Charger for uninterrupted charging while viewing content, streaming a movie, or doing a video call.

- MaagSafe® Compatibility

Works with 12, 13, 14, 15 and 16, 17 series. It can also be snapped to any MagaSafe® compatible phone cases and other accessories. It works with only MagaSafe® compatible phone cases.

- Vegan leather and a steal at its price

Soft vegan leather not only feels smooth to touch but also is environmentally sustainable. At half the cost of most phone wallets, it’s the most accessible way to perfect the way you interact with your phone. Available in four classic colors that never go out of style including Night Black, Sienna Brown, Oxford Blue, and Grey.

- Burden-free technology and optimized convenience

Unseen, Unnoticed and Unfelt

Continuing MOFT’s invisible design philosophy the slim MOFT Snap-on is unseen when attached, unfelt when worked on, unnoticed when carried, taking your phone experience a gigantic leap forward with no burden to your style of life.

aiTexts: MOFT Snap-On Phone Stand & Wallet is a sleek, ultra-thin 5mm accessory compatible with MagSafe®, combining a phone stand and wallet in one.
Made with durable vegan leather and fiberglass, it features 16 strong magnets ensuring secure attachment to your device.
It supports three viewing angles—portrait, landscape, and floating—providing versatile hands-free use.
Holds up to 2 cards discreetly in an ‘invisible wallet’ design, ideal for daily commutes and social settings.
Lightweight and portable, it fits easily in your pocket, perfect for users seeking convenience, style, and eco-friendly materials.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

brand.name: MOFT
brand.suggestion: More Mobile & Tablet Accessories from MOFT

product.desc:
All MOFT Products come with 6 Months Local Warranty

Product Highlights

Made with MOVAS

(IMPORTANT) Understanding the product:

1) Only compatible with 12, 13, 14, 15 and 16, 17 Series

2) Only compatible when used with:

a) 12, 13, 14, 15 and 16, 17 Series Without Case or

b) original Magsaafe Cases or

c) our tested Magasafe compatible case which can be found in our shop.

3) NOT compatible with cases without Magsaafe.

4) Attach a magnetic ring (can be found in our shop) onto your non-magnetic phone for magnetic attachment

Features:

MOFT Snap-on Stand & Wallet for 12, 13, 14,15,16,17 Series

World's 1st MagSaafe® compatible stand & wallet, bringing a whole new experience to your 12, 13, 14, 15 and 16, 17 Series

Features:

- Coexistence of Flexibility and Freedom

Snap-on in a blink, Stand, and Fold

Expanding on the popular MOFT X classic phone stand, the new MOFT Snap-On employs dual magnets to attach securely to 12 series and beyond. The fold-design allows for intuitive and flexible usage - simply snap it on, stand it up and fold it back into place. A powerful new assistant in your gadget life.

- Classic portrait and landscape modes

A new way to make your phone stand up

Three viewing modes - Portrait, Landscape, and the new Floating mode - enable you to look at your phone screen in the most comfortable way, whether you’re browsing the web in portrait, streaming in landscape, or having a zoom meeting in floating mode.

- Snap-Snap

The bridge between your phone and your everyday environment

The double-sided magnet design allows you to snap your phone anywhere you like. The magnetic strength comes from 16 small built-in magnets. So you can experience the hands-free from every corner of your home with MOFT’s Magnetic Sticky Pads which can snap on any surface to transform your phone into an exercise, bath time, or cooking companion.

- Instant removal, uninterrupted enjoyment

Total freedom with effortless detachment. And seamlessly layers with the MagSaafe® Charger for uninterrupted charging while viewing content, streaming a movie, or doing a video call.

- MaagSafe® Compatibility

Works with 12, 13, 14, 15 and 16, 17 series. It can also be snapped to any MagaSafe® compatible phone cases and other accessories. It works with only MagaSafe® compatible phone cases.

- Vegan leather and a steal at its price

Soft vegan leather not only feels smooth to touch but also is environmentally sustainable. At half the cost of most phone wallets, it’s the most accessible way to perfect the way you interact with your phone. Available in four classic colors that never go out of style including Night Black, Sienna Brown, Oxford Blue, and Grey.

- Burden-free technology and optimized convenience

Unseen, Unnoticed and Unfelt

Continuing MOFT’s invisible design philosophy the slim MOFT Snap-on is unseen when attached, unfelt when worked on, unnoticed when carried, taking your phone experience a gigantic leap forward with no burden to your style of life.
product.highlights:
• Specifications:
  • - Thickness: 5 mm
  • - Weight: 40 grams
  • - Dimensions: 64*98*5mm
  • - Materials: Vegan leather, fiberglass
  • - 3 viewing modes: Portrait, Landscape, and Floating
  • - Double-side magnet: 16 built-in magnets in total
  • - Holds up to 2 cards for MOVAS
  • - Works with Magaafe® compatible accessories
  • Color Disclaimer
  • Actual product color may vary from the images shown. Every monitor or mobile display has a different capability to display colors, and every individual may see these colors differently.
